,drjQk ;k=k ds fy, vf/klwfpr nj ds Ms<+ xquk ds fglkc ls 'kqYd dk Hkqxrku djsA ;fn okgu dks ckj&ckj bl lqfo/kk dk mi;ksx djuk gks rks okgu esa O;fDr vFkok okgu dk iz;ksDrk ,drjQk ;k=k ds fy, vf/klwfpr nj ds 30 xquk ds cjkcj izHkkj dk Hkqxrku djds ekfld ikl izkIr dj ysA [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@456@08&09@lhvks@thlh nkSlk¼vkxjk&Hkjriqj½chvksVh] vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi the 22nd December, 2014 S.O. 3253(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the use of Section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highways) Rules, 1997, M/s Oriental Pathways (Agra) Private Limited was authorized to collect and retain the fee for the development, operation and maintenance of the existing two lane road into four lane road from km 18.000 to km 63.000 (Agra-Bharatpur section) of National Highway No. 11 in the States of Uttar Pradesh and Rajasthan on Build, Operate and Transfer (BOT) basis vide S.O. No. 1515(E) dated 18.06.2009 and amended vide S.O. No. 2227(E) dated 22.07.2013. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby makes following amendments in the notification published vide S.O. No. 1515(E) dated 18.06.2009: Para 4 of Notes on Page No. 8 of the Fee Notification shall be substituted: For When the same vehicle has to cross the said section more than once in a day, the user shall have the option to pay fee for multiple trips at the rate one and half times the rate specified in column (3) of above table while crossing the toll plaza in the first trip itself, or where such vehicle has to use the said section continuously and frequently for the entire month, the user may have a monthly pass at the rate thirty times the rate so specified. As When the same vehicle has to cross the said stretch for a round trip within a span of 24 hours, the user shall have the option to pay one and half time of the notified rate for one way trip while crossing the toll plaza in the first trip itself. If the vehicle has to use the facility frequently, the vehicle occupier or user can have a monthly pass on the payment of charges equal to 30 times of the notified rate for one way trip. [F. No. NHAI/13013/456/08-09/CO/GC Dausa (Agra-Bharatpur) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
